ground_truth.title: The Top 25 Hosting Trends of 2025, According to Event Planners
ground_truth.author: Rebecca Norris
ground_truth.main_content: Summer is officially here, and with it, endless potential to host the soiree of your dreams. While classic backyard barbecues, whimsical midsummer parties, and elevated alfresco gatherings are common themes this time of year, there's always the option to think more creatively to host a curated event that guests will remember long after last call. An easy way to get the ball rolling is to brush up on the top hosting trends of 2025. This year, it's less about showing off and more about creating a sense of ease. The best events feel intentional, beautiful, and personal. Hosts want their guests to be comfortable, to be entertained, and to be taken care of. The 25 trends include: A Focus on Storytelling where hosts weave in personal narratives from invitations to tablescapes; Customized Menu and Paper Suites with interactive elements; Neo-Pastel Palettes with Saturated Accents featuring sophisticated dusty pastels grounded by bold colors; A Full Drip Color Story with deeply saturated monochromatic palettes; Bold Color Mixes using rich shades like red, chocolate brown, punchy pinks, lavender, yellow, cobalt, and chartreuse; A Moment for Chartreuse creating unexpected juxtaposition; Creating a Home Away from Home with table settings designed to look like the client's dining room; Mismatched Glassware adding relaxed charm and unique stories to tables; Layered Tablescapes with varied textures and heights; Garden-Inspired Florals; Food as Decor; Hand-Drawn Dinner Party elements; Lighting That Sets the Mood; Florals as Architecture; Ribbons (Within Reason); Dramatic Draping; Fluid, Interactive Dining; Nostalgic Desserts; Lounge-Style Seating; Elevated Cocktail Hours; Botanical Cocktails and Garnish Bars; Charismatic Bartenders; Hyper-Personalized Guest Touchpoints; Interactive Guest Experiences; and An After-Party Event.
with: Summer is officially here, and with it, endless potential to host the soiree of your dreams.
This year, it's less about showing off and more about creating a sense of ease.
The best events feel intentional, beautiful, and personal.
Storytelling transforms an event from stylish to deeply personal.
In 2025, it's all about personality, not perfection, and mismatched glassware captures that vibe perfectly.
without: Every item on this page was chosen by a Veranda editor
